preservedBehaviors.description: PATCH requires staff auth via requireStaff() and returns gate error/status on failure
PATCH validates the id parameter and returns 400 for non-numeric, zero, or negative ids
PATCH returns ok:true, updated:false when no recognized fields are in the body
PATCH returns ok:true, updated:true on successful update and 404 when no rows match
PATCH catches contacts_phone_unique constraint errors and returns 409
PATCH dynamically builds SET clause with only provided fields
DELETE requires super admin auth via requireStaff({ requireSuperAdmin: true })
DELETE validates id, checks existence, deletes scoped to contact_type='athlete', returns ok:true
OPTIONS returns 204 with Allow header listing PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS
PATCH checks staff email conflicts and returns 409 with EMAIL_IN_USE_BY_STAFF code when email matches a staff contact
PATCH checks athlete email conflicts (excluding current id) and returns 409 when email matches another athlete contact
PATCH allows parent contacts to share emails with athletes (no parent conflict check)
PATCH does NOT catch contacts_email_unique constraint as a known error (email is no longer globally unique)
Staff email conflict check runs before athlete conflict check; if staff conflict found, athlete query is not executed
Conflict responses include full existingContact shape with id (string), contactType, firstName, lastName, email
Email conflict checks only fire when email is provided in body AND safeText produces a non-null value
UPDATE query scopes WHERE clause to contact_type = 'athlete'
Generic errors return 500 with the error message
